title: Per-capita CO2 (production-based) indexed to 1990, 26-country panel
subtitle: Pop-weighted mean 2020/1990 ratio: 2.31; mean GDP-per-capita ratio: 2.07; 12/26 countries decoupled (>= 30% GDP growth AND >= 10% CO2 fall).

annotations.label: Production-based proxy (CO2). Consumption-based MF unavailable on disk; offshoring critique untested.
